violations.text: Unnecessary and/or non-functional equipment or items were observed throughout establishment. Establishments shall be kept free of unnecessary and/or non-functional equipment and litter to prevent harborage conditions. New Violation. Correct By: 07/03/2024
The Person in charge did not assure compliance with critical code requirements. New Violation. Correct By: 07/01/2024
Cans of food items were observed adulterated by rodent droppings on lids. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 07/01/2024

Raw animal foods were not stored properly to prevent cross-contamination. Except when combined as ingredients, different types of raw animal foods must be separated from each other during storage by using separate equipment or arrranging each type of food in equipment so that cross contamination of one type with another is prevented. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 07/01/2024
Food contact surfaces of (ice machine) were observed with black/red/orange residue. The food contact surfaces of equipment must be clean to sight and touch. New Violation. Correct By: 07/01/2024

Food contact surfaces of equipment/utensils (containers/lids) were observed with an accumulation of rodent droppings. The food contact surfaces of equipment must be clean to sight and touch. New Violation. Correct By: 07/01/2024

Sausage and cut lettuce was observed held at 46-48 degrees Fahrenheit. Time/temperature control for safety (TCS) food must be held at 41 degrees Fahrenheit or below except during preparation, cooking, or cooling. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 07/01/2024

Sauces were observed not marked with the date of preparation. Ready-to-eat time/temperature control for safety (TCS) foods prepared in the establishment and held for more than 24 hours must be marked with the date of preparation. New Violation. Correct By: 07/01/2024

The door to the outside, located in the kitchen, is not tight-fitting. Outer openings of a food establishment must be protected against the entry of insects and rodents by tight-fitting doors. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 07/03/2024

The presence of rodents is not controlled as evidenced by droppings throughout kitchen area. The presence of insects, rodents, and other pests must be controlled by routinely inspecting the premises for evidence of pests, using acceptable methods to control pests, eliminating harborage conditions, and routinely inspecting incoming shipments of food and supplies. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 07/03/2024

The presence of insects is not controlled as evidenced by small flying insects in ware washing area. The presence of insects, rodents, and other pests must be controlled by routinely inspecting the premises for evidence of pests, using acceptable methods to control pests, eliminating harborage conditions, and routinely inspecting incoming shipments of food and supplies. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 07/03/2024
Limes and drinks were observed stored on the floor in the kitchen and walk-in cooler. Food must be stored at least 6 inches above the floor. New Violation. Correct By: 07/03/2024

The ice scoop is stored on an unclean surface (top of the ice machine) between uses. During pauses in food preparation, utensils must be stored on a clean surface or in a clean, protected location. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 07/01/2024
Ambient of cold drawers was at 46 degrees Fahrenheit. Unit taken out of service. Corrected On-Site. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 07/01/2024

The non-food contact surfaces of the following have an accumulation of rodent droppings. 1. Shelving (clean equipment) 2. 3 Bay sink 3. Dishwasher 4. Ice machine (top) 5. Dry storage rack New Violation. Correct By: 07/01/2024
The non-food contact surfaces of the fryers have an accumulation of grease and other debris. New Violation. Correct By: 07/03/2024

The floors and walls throughout the facility have an accumulation of soil residue and/or food debris. The physical facilities shall be cleaned as often as necessary to keep them clean. New Violation. Correct By: 07/03/2024

Unnecessary and/or non-functional equipment or items were observed in the kitchen area. Establishments shall be kept free of unnecessary and/or non-functional equipment and litter to prevent harborage conditions. New Violation. Correct By: 07/03/2024
